---
title: "Awesome Yi"
subtitle: "The world in my eyes."
listing:
  contents: posts
  feed: true
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  exclude:
    author: "draft*"
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
---
```{r}
#| echo=FALSE
today <- as.character(Sys.Date())
```

This blog site was recently updated on **`{r} today`**.

<br>
